patches_modified.name: AMOLED dark theme
patches_modified.description: Makes the dark theme fully pure-black (AMOLED): backgrounds and surfaces/cards/bars become #000000. Dark mode only; borders, dividers and branded fills are kept for readability.

patches_modified.name: Block listings
patches_modified.description: Hides Avito offers from blacklisted adverts or sellers and adds a blacklist manager (import/export compatible with the Ave Blacklist extension).

patches_modified.name: Disable telemetry
patches_modified.description: Disables Avito first-party clickstream analytics and Avito's direct Adjust telemetry wrapper.

patches_modified.name: Disable update prompts
patches_modified.description: Prevents Avito's force-update screen opener from launching update screens. Toggleable in Настройки Morphe.

patches_modified.name: Morphe settings
patches_modified.description: Adds a "Настройки Morphe" entry to Avito's settings that hosts the configuration for the other Morphe patches.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Disables Avito ads by removing ad SDK entry points and short-circuiting commercial banner loading.

patches_modified.name: UI tweaks
patches_modified.description: Optional interface tweaks, each toggleable in Настройки Morphe: single-row home categories, hide the "Подписки" tab in Избранное, hide installments (Рассрочка) and the "Спросите у продавца" block on offers, expand descriptions by default (no "Читать далее"), and hide the Avi assistant tab in the bottom navigation.

patches_modified.name: Bypass anti-tamper
patches_modified.description: Stubs TBank's native RASP executor calls and neutralizes tamper flag reporting.

patches_modified.name: Remove TBank ads
patches_modified.description: Removes TBank stories and promotional surfaces.

patches_modified.name: Remove Wildberries ads
patches_modified.description: Removes Wildberries home banners, grid banners, promo headers, product recommendations, and lottery popups.

patches_modified.name: Remove Ozon ads
patches_modified.description: Removes Ozon ad widgets, banner carousels, video ads, and PDP promo blocks.

patches_modified.name: Remove delay
patches_modified.description: Removes the imposed delay when changing VPN servers.

patches_modified.name: Unlock LAN connections
patches_modified.description: Enables the LAN connections feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches_modified.name: Unlock custom DNS
patches_modified.description: Enables the custom DNS feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches_modified.name: Unlock split tunneling
patches_modified.description: Enables the split tunneling feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.
